Name: Prologue
Description: Watch the intro cinematic.

Name: Tutorial Section
Description: Complete the tutorial section of the game.

Name: Visit Starting Town
Description: Explore the local village.

Name: Recover the Ancient Tome
Description: Find the lost book of cadences.

Name: Learn About Cadences
Description: Discover the power of your inner voice.

Name: Learn about Greenwood Forest
Description: Hear the rumors of the local forest.

Name: Hunt Goblins
Description: Clear out the local goblin encampment.

Name: Chop Wood
Description: Harvest wood from the corrupted forest.

Name: Learn about the Mines
Description: Find out where the miners went.

Name: Hunt Bats
Description: Clear the mine entrance of bats.

Name: Hunt Spiders
Description: Venture deeper into the webs.

Name: Hunt Slimes
Description: Clear the lower levels of sticky residue.

Name: Unlock Mining
Description: Obtain permission to mine Iron Ore.

Name: Mine Iron Ore
Description: Extract precious metals from the earth.

Name: Gather Moonberries
Description: Pick glowing fruit from the woods.

Name: Defeat Treant Guardian
Description: Face the protector of the forest.

Name: Ancient Inscriptions
Description: Decipher the ruins' entrance.

Name: Finding the Hearth
Description: Locate the central power source of the ruins.

Name: Rekindling the Spark
Description: Ignite the ancient Mythril Forge.

Name: Scavenge Scrap
Description: Search the desert sands for abandoned materials.

Name: Hunt Sand-Sharks
Description: Take down the predators of the dunes.

Name: Locate the Hidden Oasis
Description: Find the legendary sanctuary in the waste.

Name: Purify the Grove
Description: Use healing magic to cleanse the corruption from the sacred grove.

Name: Power the Forge
Description: Channel intense fire magic to reignite the ancient Mythril Forge.

Name: Shatter the Crystals
Description: Harvest prismatic fragments from the peak's formations.

Name: High Altitude Survey
Description: Map the dangerous heights of the Crystal Peaks.

Name: Harvest Sea-Life
Description: Gather biological components from the Tidal Caverns.

Name: Deep Sea Scavenge
Description: Search the lightless depths for rare coral.

Name: Archive Sifting
Description: Search through stacks of ancient writings.

Name: Study Ancient Texts
Description: Learn from the preserved knowledge of the library.

Name: Defeat the Mythril Construct
Description: Face the ultimate defender of the Mythril Heart.

Name: Ascetic Meditation
Description: Focus your mind to achieve permanent magical growth.

Name: Heavy Training
Description: Push your body to achieve permanent physical growth.
